signals.headline: RIPPLE USD (RLUSD) STABLECOIN FULL ROLLOUT CONFIRMED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RIPPLE USD (RLUSD) STABLECOIN FULL ROLLOUT CONFIRMED | YES | HIGH confidence**

The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been completed as of mid-April 2026.[2] This represents a major infrastructure milestone for Ripple's payment ecosystem.

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits 100% on 220-239 Range for April 14-21, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits 100% on 220-239 Range for April 14-21, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Polymarket's most active market, "Elon Musk # tweets April 14 - April 21, 2026?", now prices the 220-239 outcome at 100¢, implying traders collectively see it as certain—up from 70% earlier this week as the period nears its end today[1][2][3]. This real-time shift reflects over $28M in trading

signals.headline: RAKUTEN WALLET LAUNCHES WITH XRP SUPPORT | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RAKUTEN WALLET LAUNCHES WITH XRP SUPPORT | YES | HIGH confidence**

Rakuten Wallet went live on April 15, 2026, adding XRP as a supported asset on a major payment platform.[1] This launched two days before XRP touched $1.50 for the first time in 2026.

signals.headline: SEC LEGAL BATTLE RESOLVED | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC LEGAL BATTLE RESOLVED | YES | HIGH confidence**

The long-standing SEC legal battle with Ripple is now officially concluded, removing a major regulatory overhang that has weighed on XRP for years.[2]

signals.headline: XRP ETFS IN FINAL APPROVAL STAGE | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETFS IN FINAL APPROVAL STAGE | YES | HIGH confidence**

Multiple XRP investment products are now live—six ETFs are currently operating—with additional approvals entering final stages.[1][2] Notably, the composition of recent buying has shifted from retail futures-driven to institutional spot ETF inflows, signaling different market dynamics.[1]

signals.headline: PRICE ACTION: $1
signals.raw:
PRICE ACTION: $1.50 RESISTANCE BREACHED | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP printed an intraday high of $1.51094 on April 17, breaking above the $1.50 level for the first time since February.[1] However, subsequent pullback to $1.43 suggests consolidation rather than sustained breakout.[1]

signals.headline: Kanye West Tweet by April 30 Market Active at 59% Yes | YES (ongoing buzz) | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Kanye West Tweet by April 30 Market Active at 59% Yes | YES (ongoing buzz) | MED confidence**  
One of 130+ live tweet markets prices "Will Kanye tweet again by April 30?" at 59% Yes, part of $27.3M volume gauging fan sentiment on niche pop culture events[2]. Traders on X aren't highlighted discussing mispricing here, but pop culture tweet markets overall draw heavy activity[1].
